key.name: main-message
key.description: The primary text displayed in the watermark.

key.name: secondary-message
key.description: The secondary text displayed in the watermark.

key.name: font-face
key.description: The font family to use for the watermark.

key.name: font-style
key.description: The font style to use (e.g., Normal, Italic).

key.name: font-color
key.description: The color of the watermark text in CSS format.

key.name: font-size
key.description: The font size of the main message in points.

key.name: pos-x
key.description: Distance from the right edge of the screen.

key.name: pos-y
key.description: Distance from the bottom edge of the screen.

key.name: show-over-windows
key.description: Whether to show the watermark overlaying all windows instead of just the desktop background.

key.name: toggle-show-over-windows-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to toggle whether the watermark overlays all windows.
